untranslatable_reason: This signal requires real-time comparison between two separate market instruments (cash index C and futures index F) with external parameters (trading costs r×t, profit margin E). The backtest engine operates on single-instrument OHLCV data. The price difference calculation |C - F| and profit formula P = |C - F| - C × r × t - E cannot be expressed using only the allowed single-instrument indicators. Additionally, parameters r, t, and profit_threshold are marked AUTHOR_SILENT and are undefined. Arbitrage signals require dual-leg monitoring across separate data feeds.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 describes index arbitrage between cash and futures markets. This requires: (1) two separate price feeds with synchronized timestamps, (2) external cost parameters not provided, (3) real-time spread monitoring. The allowed indicator set does not support multi-instrument comparisons. A proper implementation would require close and futures_close as separate indicators, plus explicit cost parameters.
